taxonomy: Bobua formosana is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is a genus endemic to Taiwan. The classification of Bobua formosana places it within the kingdom Plantae and the clade Angiosperms. This plant is further classified within the clade Magnoliids, a group of flowering plants that have flower parts in multiples of three or six. Within the Lauraceae family, Bobua formosana is part of the subfamily Perseoideae.
